_comment: Two point-in-time snapshots of three smart accounts' Farcaster 'following' sets, for testing network_radar's diff + convergence logic offline (no keys). Smart accounts: 1001, 1002, 1003. Between 'before' and 'after', all three newly follow target 9999 (convergence 3); only 1003 newly follows 8888 (convergence 1).
